0.q: PSY is known to encode the first committed and rate-limiting enzyme in the formation of carotenoids... we have produced transgenic tobacco plants constitutively expressing a fruit PSY gene (CpPSY) isolated from grapefruit.

1.q: The enhanced stress tolerance of transgenic plants was correlated with the increased endogenous ABA level and expression of stress-responsive genes, which in turn was correlated with the CpPSY copy number and expression level in different transgenic lines.

2.q: The enhanced stress tolerance of transgenic plants was correlated with the increased endogenous ABA level... these results provide further evidence that PSY is a key enzyme regulating ABA biosynthesis
